title: hieracium dyringii
intro: Hieracium dyringii, also known as Hieracium, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the alpine regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium dyringii include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues. The health benefits of consuming Hieracium dyringii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of Hieracium dyringii include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
